summary: Frontend UI/UX audit completed. Theme toggle, navigation, and all specified pages tested in both light and dark modes. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' in machine select dropdown (line 379). This is a React hydration warning from dynamic content in select options - minor, does not affect functionality.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI/UX features verified working. Theme system fully functional with localStorage persistence.

theme_toggle_localStorage_persistence.notes: Theme stored in 'aps-theme' key. Toggling from dark->light->dark works correctly.

business_rules_conditions_readability.notes: Conditions box with CSS classes '.conditions-box', '.conditions-group', '.conditions-box-title' displays correctly in both themes. Blue section is readable.

manufacturing_orders_badges_tables.notes: 4 stats cards visible. Table with badges (orange article, blue tache, purple centre) all readable. URGENT/RETARD badges visible with proper contrast.

projected_stock_page.notes: Page loads without error. 4 summary cards (Total Articles, En Rupture, Stock OK, Ordonnancees) visible. Stock projection table displays data correctly.

dashboard_kpis.notes: 4 KPI cards visible: ORDRES TOTAL (10), EN ATTENTE (10), EN RETARD (0), MACHINES (8). Quick actions and getting started guide visible.

scheduling_page_interface.notes: Page shows 'Ordonnancement APS' with priority mode cards, solver parameters, and constraints section. Consistent styling in both themes.

aps_dashboard_kpis.notes: 4 KPI cards: OTD (0%), Ordres en Retard (0), Utilisation Machines (0%), WIP (10). Machine capacity chart visible with all 8 machines listed.

sidebar_navigation.notes: 6/6 navigation links tested and working: Dashboard (/), APS Dashboard (/aps), Scheduling (/scheduling), Rules (/rules), Orders (/orders), Projected Stock (/projected-stock)

dark_mode_readability.notes: Dark mode class applies correctly. CSS variables provide proper contrast. All sections readable.

light_mode_readability.notes: Light mode applies correctly with proper text contrast. All UI elements visible and accessible.

css_theme_system_verification.variables_defined: App.css has complete CSS variable system with :root (light) and .dark class definitions
css_theme_system_verification.colors_verified: Status colors (success, warning, error, info) have proper contrast in both themes

test_methodology: Playwright browser automation with theme toggle tests, navigation verification, and visual screenshots in both themes
